data.name: company.name.max_length
data.value: Name must be 200 characters or fewer.

data.name: company.external_code.max_length
data.value: External code must be 64 characters or fewer.

data.name: company.status.invalid
data.value: Status must be Active or Inactive.

data.name: company_address.address_type.invalid
data.value: Address type must be Legal, Billing, Shipping, or Warehouse.

data.name: company_address.country_code.exact_length
data.value: Country code must be exactly 2 characters.

data.name: company_address.city.max_length
data.value: City must be 100 characters or fewer.

data.name: company_address.postal_code.max_length
data.value: Postal code must be 32 characters or fewer.

data.name: company_address.line1.max_length
data.value: Line1 must be 200 characters or fewer.

data.name: company_address.line2.max_length
data.value: Line2 must be 200 characters or fewer.
